title: Actually 3D Food
description: Some food are now 3d up to 15 food items!
body:
Actually 3D Food is an Addon for Actually 3D Stuff(A3DS).
It Adds New Food Models to Over 10 Food Items!
Hope you enjoy! (Beware there are some problems with the food positioning.) So I Added The [HMI] Pose Editor Mod.
